title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

title: Oral-B CrossAction Toothbrush Heads - 16 Degree Bristles for Superior Cleaning
description:
Product Description
The Oral-B CrossAction brush head is our most advanced replacement brush and is now available as a Black Edition. With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles, it goes deep into the interdental spaces and ensures a superior plaque removal compared to a conventional manual toothbrush. The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head. The brush head is compatible with all Oral-B electric toothbrushes except Oral-B Pulsonic. 3 Oral-B CrossAction Black Edition replacement toothbrush heads are included.
Set Contains:
3 x replacement brushes.
features: Advanced brush heads reach deep between the teeth
With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles
The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head

reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.

reviews.text: I really like the cross action feature on these guys, I am able to feel the clean sensation on it.  It is well worth the price.

features: INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each medium soft toothbrush is individually wrapped in a paper casing. Toothbrush Height: 7 Inches. These manual toothbrushes design with ergonomic shape and grip handle for maximum control while brushing. A great low cost option for everyday use or for those ones and done circumstances.

MEDIUM SOFT BRISTLES: Medium soft toothbrush bristles are made soft to the touch to prevent any damage from being done to the enamel of your teeth when removing plaque. Brush away & feel the difference!

STANDARD SIZE: These medium soft toothbrush are standard sized. They are intended for adults but children can use them as well. Each Pack oral toothbrush comes with a variety of colors so you don’t mistake your brush with your friends or family members. Give your favorite color to your family member or pass this along to a friend when going on adventures.

WHOLESALE TOOTHBRUSHES: There are so many uses for toothbrushes in bulk quantity. Commercially, they can be redistributed in hotels, Airbnb apartments, dental offices, community events, school rooms, to the homeless and the needy, and hygiene drives. They are also great for personal use if you are a frequent traveler, or are in the habit of disposing of your toothbrushes often.

PERFECT TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: Our disposable manual toothbrushes pack is perfect for traveling, camping, business trips and those on the go. Use them as little or as long as you’d like and toss them out when you’re done! This makes them extremely convenient for everyday use or buy as wholesale toothbrush for donation.

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: This product works well. Although pricey, so worth it to save your teeth.

reviews.title: It is recommended by my dentist!
reviews.text: Use it daily and keeps my oral implants clean and healthy!

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

ADA-APPROVED BASS TECHNIQUE: Each brush head features the ADA-approved BASS technique that ensures bristles hit your teeth at a 45° angle with up to 30,000 pulses per minute to effectively fight plaque
SUSTAINABLE: Every order is packaged in recyclable cardboard and carbon offset with our environmentally friendly partners

SENSORY FRIENDLY: For individuals with oral sensitivities that may make it difficult to use toothbrushes with nylon bristles, our silicone bristle option offers a perfect solution that provides gentle yet effective oral care

AMERICAN-BASED COMPANY: Headquartered in San Diego, AutoBrush is the pioneer of the whole-mouth sonic toothbrush whose goal is to simplify and enhance the brushing experience for everyone, including children, adults, those with disabilities, and individuals with sensory sensitivities

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience

There are multiple intensities of bruising power for different parts of my mouth. My teeth went from obvious coffee drinker to noticeably whiter and healthier. The bristles are gentle regardless of which setting I used. The narrow head allows me to easily brush my back teeth and gums.

When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

title: Zekuavi Replacement Heads Compatible with Phillips Sonicare Electric Toothbrush, Toothbrush Heads Fits for Diamond Protective Expert Daily 4100 5100 6100 1100 7500 6500, Black 8Pcs
features: ★Compatible with Phillips Sonicare, ProtectiveClean, ExpertClean,DailyClean,2 Series 3 Series, 4100/2100/9900Plaque Control,Gum Health, EasyClean, Essence+, FlexCare, HealthyWhite and HydroClean Philips Brush Handle, (NOT Compatible with Essence,Sonicare One,HX5611/01 Essence)

★US DuPont Bristles: Our brushes are made with DuPont bristles, which is the most representative high-quality nylon bristles. DuPont bristles mainly have the following advantages: high tenacity, strong bending recovery, outstanding wear resistance, and perfect cleaning power.

★Durable brush: Thanks to DuPont bristles, our brush can be used for a long time without being easily deformed, the service life varies according to the brushing strength of each person: from 2 months for high brushing intensity to 3 months for moderate brushing intensity

★End-rounded bristles: For our brush bristles, we have adopted a variety of top-rounding techniques. The protruding bristles on the upper, middle and lower parts of the brush undergo the first rounding process; then the concave part is rounded for the second time to ensure that each bunch of bristles meet the standard. The multi-process is only to better protect your teeth and oral health

★High density bristles: The toothbrush head adopts the latest bristle planting technology, and the number of bristles has increased by 2 times. The bottom of each bunch of bristles is fixed with metal copper sheets, which can prevent bristle shed, increase the durability of the brush head, and greatly improve the cleaning ability.

★Vibration isolation and noise reduction: 306 stainless steel is used at the interface between the bottom of the toothbrush and the electric toothbrush, which can effectively reduce shake and noise, moreover, be more resistant to corrosion. Copper sheet is used inside the brush body to conduct sonic waves, improving the sonic wave transmission efficiency and the cleaning capacity by 5 times.

★Suitable for Home Use: If you purchase our product, you will receive 8 replacement toothbrush heads neatly placed in a blister case. Each brush head has its own color markings at the bottom and back, making it easy to distinguish without worrying about confusion.
★Bacterial Protection Bristles :The special bacterial protection bristles help to keep your brush head clean and inhibit bacterial growth on the brush.

★HYGIENIC CAP :Each replacement sonicare brush head comes with a hygienic secure cover to keep your bristle free of dust and debris. You don't have to worry about bacteria that might cause you dental problems.

★Reminder bristles: Our Green indicator bristles discolour to let you know when to replace them, don't need to worry or guess. Dentists recommend replacing the brush head at least once every 3 months.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

title: Brush Buddies 2 Piece Shopkins Toothbrush (2 Packs= 4 Toothbrushes)
description: Ergonomic Design: The brush is designed to give your child a better grip; It has soft, end-rounded bristles that protect the gums and enamel of the teeth; It comes with 4 different Blippi holographic caps Brushing Fun: Adults will appreciate the quality and price point, kids will love the fun details and array of characters including the Shopkins, Garfield, and Kung Fu Panda plus Papa Smurf, Smurfette, Jojo Siwa Electric, Manual, Novelty: Explore oral hygiene products including dental floss, travel toothbrushes, soft and medium toothbrush heads, baby finger toothbrushes, and options for toddlers, kids, and adult Toothbrushes for Kids: Have fun brushing with fun licensed characters; Find the best kids toothbrush heads, electric toothbrushes for kids, kids toothbrush holders, toothbrush covers, and kids toothbrush sets Oral Health: Help clean teeth and freshen bad breath while fighting cavities and plaque with Brush Buddies; Get toothbrush packs, replacement heads, travel sets, denture care, mouthwash, flossers, and more

reviews.title: Perfect size for tiny mouths!
reviews.text:
These are perfect toddler or little kid sized toothbrushes. It’s nice to have 4 of them since kids don’t always use them at the sink. Some how they get into rooms or cars if we are in a hurry right? Also good to have a backup one ready if the toilet is near the sink and it “accidentally” falls in lol. This was part of a birthday present we sent to our niece that turned 5. I like to give something practical, something educational, and something fun!
Every time I purchase something online, I always check the reviews. I count on others to help me choose the best option. My reviews are always my honest opinion and I try to include photos if possible.
If my review has helped you in any way, please click the "helpful" button below so that I know! If you have any questions feel free to ask! Thank you!

reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits
reviews.text: Each year we put together kits for the unhomed.  These work well as they're individually packaged.  Would definitely buy again.  But would appreciate a discount of some kind to help us provide more kits in the future.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

reviews.title: Broke after 1yr
reviews.text: I purchased this toothbrush from another seller/company who is no longer selling this product. As you can see, the neck broke after about 1yr of usage.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Very happy with this Sonic electric toothbrush. I like all the different speeds. Very simple and quick to charge and would be easy to travel with and charge. Nice snap cover for the brush making it easier to pack the brush for travel.  Timer mode works great encouraging me not to be in such a hurry brushing my teeth.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

reviews.title: 5 Different modes
reviews.text: Works really well. It does feel weird since I’m not so used to using an electric toothbrush. Very convenient that it comes with 3 brush heads & usb cable

title: Colgate Max White Full Head Toothbrush, Medium( Assorted Colors)
description: Colgate Max White Full Head Toothbrush with polishing star, Soft. Unique polishing star removes stains to reveal the natural whiteness of your teeth.
features: Recharge Your Smile!
Unique polishing star and specially designed bristle pattern
Removes stains
Reveals natural whiteness of your teeth

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

【IPX7 WATERPROOF】IPX7 waterproof sealing design is adopted, and babies can also use it when bathing. The product can be placed in a water depth of 1 meter and soaked for 15 minutes, and the product is still in normal use without being damaged.

【FAST CHARGING】 The ultrasonic toothbrush is equipped with fast charging cable, which can be discharged and charged instantly. The LED lights on when USB charging is connected, and it only needs to be charged for 3 hours and can be used for 1 week. Safe, fast and convenient, easy to use at home or travel.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: My eldest has a difficult time with the sensation of anything against his gums.  This results in nasty plaque.  I was hopeful that this would be a solution but it's not.  Expensive let down.

reviews.title: Worked great for 3 months
reviews.text: Worked great for 3 months. Then stopped working even though it was fully charged.

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth
reviews.text:
Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: My kids absolutely love these. The brush their teeth everyday without a fight. I love them they are small perfect for kid hands and super easy to use.
